description:
Add a second impl of the Backend trait introduced in fz-ul4.23.4.6 that wraps cranelift_object::ObjectModule. Produces a .o file on disk; no startup shim, no linker step yet.

## Acceptance

- A new test compiles fixtures/add1.fz via the AOT backend, emits /tmp/add1.o, and asserts `nm /tmp/add1.o` lists symbols for `add1` and `main`.
- No `fz build` user surface yet — that comes in 6.3.
title: Add an AOT Backend impl using ObjectModule (no main, no link)
